ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of location (residential, commercial, etc.) */,
  "geohash" TEXT /* Geohash representation of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_zip FOREIGN KEY ("zip") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the city is situated */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code value */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the zip code is situated */,
  "area_code" INTEGER /* Area code of the zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location tag */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_tags_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, logistics) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., distance, proximity) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_analytics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
